channel.title: itschachigonzales TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from itschachigonzales

item.title: Been through the trenches of back to school viruses….BUT WE ARE BACK BAYYYBBEEEEE 💃🏻 dc: @Kimmiiz.official (ครูคิม)🇹🇭 #dance #fyp

item.title: This song forever tickles my brain 💃🏻 dc: @jaydaaaa. #fyp #dance

item.title: IT’S A GREAT DAY TO HAVE A GREAT DAY 😁 a lil dance spaz out almost always guarantees a great day @jukka dudeson #fyp
item.description: IT’S A GREAT DAY TO HAVE A GREAT DAY 😁 a lil dance spaz out almost always guarantees a great day @jukka dudeson #fyp

item.title: IT WAS A RAINY & BREEZY DAY WHICH MEANS ITS HALLOWEEN. I DONT MAKE THE RULES 🎃 #fyp #halloween

item.title: Dancing on crunchy leaves is my kinda ASMR 🙌🏼 dc: MISS @PresPlay 💃🏻🫶🏼 #fyp #dance

item.title: Just brushing up on my minionese 😅 🫶🏼🇫🇮 my Finnish learning is up and down, but I haven’t given up hope! #fyp #suomitiktok

item.title: I don’t even know what she’s saying- but you know what? HELL YEA. Dc: ME 💁🏻‍♀️ #fyp #dance @skiaggu

item.title: Can you tell how this dance had me in a chokehold from all the scuff marks on the floor? 😅 dc: @Kevin Bannier 🧩 #fyp #dance

item.title: a friendly reminder that it costs zero dollars to smile 😋 dc: @James #fyp #dance #CHACHI

item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: I can’t even believe I’m writing this…I AM GOING TO BE MAKING MY MUSIC DEBUT AT @UMK !! 😁Pinch me. My world has always revolved around music in one way or another. Dancing was always my way to heal and say everything I needed to say without having to say
item.description: I can’t even believe I’m writing this…I AM GOING TO BE MAKING MY MUSIC DEBUT AT @UMK !! 😁Pinch me. My world has always revolved around music in one way or another. Dancing was always my way to heal and say everything I needed to say without having to say
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: In her pop star era 💃🏻🍒 CHERY CAKE DROPS JAN 22 AT MIDNIGHT (don’t forget the stretchy pants) 💃🏻🫶🏼 @UMK #CHACHI #umk26
item.description: In her pop star era 💃🏻🍒 CHERY CAKE DROPS JAN 22 AT MIDNIGHT (don’t forget the stretchy pants) 💃🏻🫶🏼 @UMK #CHACHI #umk26
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: MY FIRST SONG DROPS IN 3 DAYS?! WHAT DO YOU EVEN MEAN?! 🍒💃🏻 ARE YOU READY FOR CHERRY CAKE?! #fyp #CHACHI #umk26 @UMK
item.description: MY FIRST SONG DROPS IN 3 DAYS?! WHAT DO YOU EVEN MEAN?! 🍒💃🏻 ARE YOU READY FOR CHERRY CAKE?! #fyp #CHACHI #umk26 @UMK
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: Tonight is the night that little me has dreamed of countless times. Thank you guys for being a part of all of my shenanigans over these years. 🥹 LET’S FREAKIN GOOOOOO 💃🏻🍒🎂 CHERRY CAKE SONG & MUSIC VIDEO DROPS TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT GMT +2 😭🥹 Suomi, toivon et
item.description: Tonight is the night that little me has dreamed of countless times. Thank you guys for being a part of all of my shenanigans over these years. 🥹 LET’S FREAKIN GOOOOOO 💃🏻🍒🎂 CHERRY CAKE SONG & MUSIC VIDEO DROPS TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT GMT +2 😭🥹 Suomi, toivon et
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: CHERRY CAKE IS OUT NOW! 🍒🎂 IF DROP IT LOWWWWW WITH MEEEE LINK TO MUSIC VIDEO IN MY BIO 🍒❤️🫶🏼💃🏻 AGHHHHH IT’S HAPPENING #umk26 #CHACHI #fyp #CherryCake #ChachiCherryCake
item.description: CHERRY CAKE IS OUT NOW! 🍒🎂 IF DROP IT LOWWWWW WITH MEEEE LINK TO MUSIC VIDEO IN MY BIO 🍒❤️🫶🏼💃🏻 AGHHHHH IT’S HAPPENING #umk26 #CHACHI #fyp #CherryCake #ChachiCherryCake
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: Thank you all a bazillion times for the birthday wishes and for ALL the love on Cherry Cake 🍒🎂🥹 Truly humbled and forever grateful. What a way to kick off my 30s! 🥹 HOPE YALL BEEN DROPPIN THAT CAKE! 👀💃🏻🍒🎂 #ChachiCherryCake #umk26 #fyp
item.description: Thank you all a bazillion times for the birthday wishes and for ALL the love on Cherry Cake 🍒🎂🥹 Truly humbled and forever grateful. What a way to kick off my 30s! 🥹 HOPE YALL BEEN DROPPIN THAT CAKE! 👀💃🏻🍒🎂 #ChachiCherryCake #umk26 #fyp
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: Fun fact: the little POP in the song is oikeesti me 🍒 my useless party trick became a part of my very first song 😅 I would LOVE to see your cherry pop moment! Tag me! Also, wall twerking in jeans should be an Olympic sport 😅 #umk26 #CHACHI #chachicherryca
item.description: Fun fact: the little POP in the song is oikeesti me 🍒 my useless party trick became a part of my very first song 😅 I would LOVE to see your cherry pop moment! Tag me! Also, wall twerking in jeans should be an Olympic sport 😅 #umk26 #CHACHI #chachicherryca
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: CHERRY CAKE DANCE 🍒🎂💃🏻 Dance with me & spread the cherry love! Learn it & tag me 🍒 Be sure to use #chachicherrycake so I can see you drop that cake! #umk26 #dance #fyp
item.description: CHERRY CAKE DANCE 🍒🎂💃🏻 Dance with me & spread the cherry love! Learn it & tag me 🍒 Be sure to use #chachicherrycake so I can see you drop that cake! #umk26 #dance #fyp
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: 10 DAYS UNTIL @UMK 🤯🙈 I cannot wait to bring this dance to the stage 💃🏻 loving your Cherry Cake covers 🥹 plz keep them coming! 🍒🎂 tag me & my choreographer @YJ 🫶🏼 WHO’S GONNA DROP THAT CAKE WITH ME?! 👀 #umk26 #dance #fyp
item.description: 10 DAYS UNTIL @UMK 🤯🙈 I cannot wait to bring this dance to the stage 💃🏻 loving your Cherry Cake covers 🥹 plz keep them coming! 🍒🎂 tag me & my choreographer @YJ 🫶🏼 WHO’S GONNA DROP THAT CAKE WITH ME?! 👀 #umk26 #dance #fyp
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: NOW DROP THAT MERCH! 🍒 These are the slays of the week! LINK IN BIO or itschachi.com 🫶🏼 ANOTHER DAY ANOTHER SLAY #umk26 #chachicherrycake #chachi

item.title: 2 ARVONTAA!! 2 GIVEAWAYS!! Viikko UMK:hon! 🥹 Show-viikon kunniaks päätin tehdä yksinkertaistetun version tanssista & arpoa Cherry Cake -merchiä!!! 🍒 48 tunnin kuluttua valitsen 2 voittajaa! Näin osallistut: 💃 Tanssiarvonta: •⁠ ⁠Julkaise oma tanssivideosi
item.description: 2 ARVONTAA!! 2 GIVEAWAYS!! Viikko UMK:hon! 🥹 Show-viikon kunniaks päätin tehdä yksinkertaistetun version tanssista & arpoa Cherry Cake -merchiä!!! 🍒 48 tunnin kuluttua valitsen 2 voittajaa! Näin osallistut: 💃 Tanssiarvonta: •⁠ ⁠Julkaise oma tanssivideosi
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: CHERRY CAKE WORKSHOP 🍒 The dance community is my safe space to be vulnerable & ask for support….AND BOY DID THE DANCE COMMUNITY IN TAMPERE SHOW UP FOR ME 🥹 really emotional moment for me to hear my community singing my song 😭 Thank you to everyone who cam
item.description: CHERRY CAKE WORKSHOP 🍒 The dance community is my safe space to be vulnerable & ask for support….AND BOY DID THE DANCE COMMUNITY IN TAMPERE SHOW UP FOR ME 🥹 really emotional moment for me to hear my community singing my song 😭 Thank you to everyone who cam
item.author: itschachigonzales

item.title: ALMOST SHOWTIME @UMK 🍒 I HOPE YOU HAVE A FUN TIME DURING MY PERFORMANCE & PLEASE VOTE 5! KIITOS! Voting instructions on my story!!! #umk26 #suomitiktok #fyp
item.description: ALMOST SHOWTIME @UMK 🍒 I HOPE YOU HAVE A FUN TIME DURING MY PERFORMANCE & PLEASE VOTE 5! KIITOS! Voting instructions on my story!!! #umk26 #suomitiktok #fyp
